subcodes.first_line: These days are the days of fasting, and the dawning-place of the evidences of the grace of God. Fasting reduceth carnal inclinations, and increaseth spiritual tendencies
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایام صیام است و مشرق ظهورات فضل مالک انام از نفسانیت میکاهد و بر روحانیت
subcodes.subjects: @law of fasting, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God
